commands.repair_reason: trusted ClawSweeper review contains P-severity findings (sha=a6835cce49dcbf6d88c64316e95ee39549f3ec1b)
commands.review_summary:
The branch adds a diagnostic activity clearing primitive and invokes it from session reset/replacement and stuck-session recovery, with regression coverage for orphaned tool/model activity and active-work preservation.

PR surface: Source +160, Tests +262. Total +422 across 9 files.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level. Current main records tool_call/model_call activity but reset/recovery lacks a cleanup primitive, and the linked issue plus PR tests exercise stale tool activity clearing; I did not run tests in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] No repair lane is needed because there are no actionable patch findings; automerge should rely on exact-head CI and maintainer acceptance of the session-state risk.

target.title: fix(diagnostics): clear stale session activity
